patina_oo_7_285.name: Patina OO-7-285
patina_oo_7_285.description: Porcupine carrier wreck cluster located in Patina Wreckage Belt 7.
patina_oo_7_285.composition: Porcupine carrier truss structure with multiple attached container spine freighters.
patina_oo_7_285.origin: Carrier lost its engine module after collision with the interceptor MLG-Tac 557 'Piratha Corp' during the Oxyde corporate war.
patina_oo_7_285.salvage_status: Major salvage target for Rust Sector scrap fleets.
